SEARCH
Package minum.testing

Class TestLogger

java.lang.Object
minum.logging.Logger
minum.testing.TestLogger
All Implemented Interfaces:
ILogger
public class TestLogger extends Logger
This implementation of Logger has a few extra functions that only apply to tests, like test(String)

There's also TestRecordingLogger, which is used to record whatever gets logged, so we can examine it as part of testing.

  • Field Summary

    Also collects data about the previously-run test

    Used for printing pertinent messages during the tests, including exceptions thrown.

    • testPrintToFile

      public void testPrintToFile(String msg, Path path)
      Appends the message provided to the end of the file indicated by path. Prepends a time/date stamp.
